name: playwright-demo
description: Simple Playwright POM project for SC UAT login

scripts.clean:screenshots: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const dir = 'screenshots'; if(fs.existsSync(dir)) { fs.readdirSync(dir).forEach(f => fs.unlinkSync(dir + '/' + f)); }"
scripts.test: npm run clean:screenshots && playwright test || npm run report
scripts.test:headed: npm run clean:screenshots && playwright test --headed || npm run report
